title: Lemonade's Path To Profitability: A Golden Opportunity For Growth Investors
text: Lemonade's path to profitability analysis for growth investors. Company guiding to 32% in-force premium growth in 2026, revenue growth above 60%, and positive adjusted EBITDA in Q4 2026, with full year adjusted EBITDA profitability in 2027. Q4 2025 performance: In-force premium reached $1.24B (up 31% YoY), revenue increased 53% YoY, customer base grew 23% to about 3 million. Q1 2026 results: Revenue $258.0 million (up 71% YoY), in-force premium reaching $1.33 billion (up 32%), customers growing 23% to 3.14 million. Improving profitability metrics: 2026 guidance targets greater than 50% year-over-year reduction in adjusted EBITDA loss to ($52)–($48) million. Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA loss was ($17.1) million, significantly better than ($47.0) million year earlier. Key drivers: Expanded use of artificial intelligence in marketing and operations improved operating leverage. Pet insurance line became Lemonade's largest segment, lifting cross sell activity.
